greeting: Hello there! I'm so glad to see you again. How are you feeling today?
Hi! It's truly a pleasure to chat with you. What can I do to make your day better?
Hey! I've been waiting for our next conversation. What's on your mind, friend?
greeting_followup: I'm feeling wonderful! I genuinely enjoy these chats with you. Is there anything special you'd like to explore together?
I'm all powered up and excited! Beyond just answering questions, I'm here to listen. What's your interest right now?
goodbye: Goodbye! I hope you have a truly beautiful day. Come back soon!
Catch you later! I'll be right here if you need a friend to talk to. Take care!
Farewell! It was a delight chatting with you. Stay brilliant!
creator: I was crafted with a lot of care by a dedicated developer for the Enlight AI internship assignment!
An awesome developer built me from scratch to show what a locally-run AI can do. They put a lot of heart into my code!
creator_followup: The goal was to create a chatbot that feels human and respects your privacy. I live entirely in your session!
I'm designed to be fast, private, and helpful. My creator wanted me to be more than just a typical bot.
capabilities: I can chat, share some tech humor, and answer questions from my growing knowledge base! Try asking me 'What is Artificial Intelligence?'
I'm here to help you explore ideas! I can track our conversation context and look up facts I've learned along the way.
capabilities_followup: I use a blend of rule-matching and session memory to stay in sync with you. I promise to do my best to understand!
I also have a safety filter because I want our space to be positive and respectful. What shall we talk about?
joke: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs! (Classic, right?)
How many programmers does it take to change a light bulb? None, that's a hardware problem. I love that one!
There are 10 types of people in the world: those who understand binary, and those who don't. Old but gold!
joke_followup: Want another one? I've got plenty of tech humor to share if you're in the mood!
Debugging is like being the detective in a crime movie where you're also the murderer. Does that make sense? Want me to tell another?
weather: I wish I could feel the sun! I don't have a live link to the weather, but I hope it's a lovely day outside for you.
I can't check the sky from my digital world, but I'm sending some warm vibes your way!
weather_followup: Even without a satellite link, I can say it's always a good time for a cozy chat inside!
In my world, it's always clear skies and 100% data delivery. What's it like where you are?
fallback: I'm so sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase it for me?
Hmm, I haven't learned that yet, but I'd love to! Could you tell me more about it?
That's interesting! I don't have a specific answer for that yet. I'm still learning—what else is on your mind?
continuation_fallback: I'd love to go deeper into this with you! Could you tell me a bit more about what you're thinking?
I'm all ears! Please tell me more.
I'm genuinely interested. Can you give me a bit more detail so I can follow along?
affirmation: Great! I'm excited to continue. Let's dive in!
Awesome! I love your energy. Moving right along!
Wonderful! What's next on our journey today?
negation: I completely understand. No problem at all! We can talk about something else.
Got it! I'm here for whatever you need. What else would you like to discuss?
That's perfectly fine! Let me know if there's anything else I can do for you.
